evals.prompt: Run the pytest suite and diagnose why 3 tests are failing with ImportError
evals.expected_output: Identified missing dependency and resolution steps

evals.prompt: Generate a coverage report for a Go project and identify uncovered paths
evals.expected_output: Coverage profile with HTML report and list of uncovered functions

evals.prompt: Detect flaky tests in a Jest suite by running them multiple times
